ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., SOLCP, Site Investigation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the facility (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of inmates or individuals the facility can accommodate */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was opened */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was closed (if applicable) */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency overseeing the facility */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector conducting the inspection */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Details of the findings during the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., safety, compliance, routine) */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next inspection */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of findings (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken as a result of the inspection findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the inspector (e.g., compliance officer, safety officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector belongs to */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Inspector's qualifications or certifications */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the inspector has */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspector's last training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., state, federal, private) */,
  "head_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the head contact person at the agency */,
  "head_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the head contact person */,
  "head_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the head contact person */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the agency was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_history" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being audited for compliance */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the compliance review */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection linked to the compliance record */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., safety, compliance, routine) */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next compliance review */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Action plan for addressing non-compliance issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_history_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_history_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inspector) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the facility data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility that had changes made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the facility record */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the changes were made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
